mapper.sql:
SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc, p.brand AS brand, p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.point AS point, p.stock AS stock, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, p.view_count AS viewCount, p.sold_count AS soldCount,
MAX( CASE WHEN pi.image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN pi.image_path END ) AS thumb1Path,
COALESCE( MAX( CASE WHEN pi.image_type = 'THUMB2' THEN pi.image_path END ), MAX( CASE WHEN pi.image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN pi.image_path END ), MAX( CASE WHEN pi.image_type = 'MAIN' THEN pi.image_path END ) ) AS imagePath,
ROUND(IFNULL(AVG(pr.rating), 0), 1) AS avgRating, COUNT(DISTINCT pr.review_no) AS reviewCount
FROM product p
JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.product_no = pi.product_no
LEFT JOIN product_review pr ON p.product_no = pr.product_no
WHERE p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'
GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.basic_desc, p.brand, p.price, p.discount_rate, p.point, p.stock, p.delivery_fee, p.view_count, p.sold_count
mapper.select: ORDER BY p.sold_count DESC LIMIT 5
ORDER BY p.view_count DESC LIMIT 8
ORDER BY avgRating DESC, reviewCount DESC LIMIT 8
ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC LIMIT 8
ORDER BY (p.sold_count * 3 + p.view_count) DESC LIMIT 8
ORDER BY p.discount_rate DESC, p.price DESC LIMIT 8

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc,
p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.stock AS stock, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee,
img.image_path AS imagePath,
sp.company_name AS sellerName,
/* 현재 상품 리뷰 통계 */ IFNULL(rv.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS reviewCount,
/* 판매자 전체 상품 기준 통계 */ IFNULL(ss.seller_avg_rating, 0) AS sellerAvgRating, IFNULL(ss.seller_review_count, 0) AS sellerReviewCount, IFNULL(ss.seller_sold_count, 0) AS sellerSoldCount,
/* 판매자 뱃지 판정 */ CASE WHEN ss.seller_avg_rating >= 4.5 AND ss.seller_review_count >= 10 THEN 'SATISFACTION'
WHEN ss.seller_sold_count >= 2000 THEN 'BEST'
WHEN ss.seller_avg_rating >= 4.0 OR ss.seller_sold_count >= 1600 THEN 'EXCELLENT'
ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS sellerBadgeCode
FROM product p
/* 상품 판매자 정보 */ JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
/* 상품 대표 썸네일 1장 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, MAX( CASE WHEN image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN image_path END ) AS image_path FROM product_image GROUP BY product_no ) img ON p.product_no = img.product_no
/* 현재 상품의 리뷰 평균 / 리뷰 수 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(review_no) AS review_count FROM product_review GROUP BY product_no ) rv ON p.product_no = rv.product_no
/* 판매자 전체 통계 판매중 상품 + 운영중 판매자 기준으로만 계산한다. 판매량과 리뷰 통계를 분리해서 계산한다. 그래야 리뷰 개수만큼 sold_count가 중복 합산되지 않는다. */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sales.seller_no, sales.seller_sold_count, IFNULL(review.seller_avg_rating, 0) AS seller_avg_rating, IFNULL(review.seller_review_count, 0) AS seller_review_count
FROM ( /* 판매자별 누적 판매량 */ SELECT p2.seller_no, SUM(p2.sold_count) AS seller_sold_count FROM product p2
JOIN seller_profile sp2 ON p2.seller_no = sp2.seller_no
WHERE p2.status = '판매중' AND sp2.status = '운영중'
GROUP BY p2.seller_no ) sales
LEFT JOIN ( /* 판매자별 전체 리뷰 평균 / 리뷰 수 */ SELECT p3.seller_no, ROUND(AVG(pr.rating), 1) AS seller_avg_rating, COUNT(pr.review_no) AS seller_review_count FROM product p3
JOIN seller_profile sp3 ON p3.seller_no = sp3.seller_no
JOIN product_review pr ON p3.product_no = pr.product_no
WHERE p3.status = '판매중' AND sp3.status = '운영중'
GROUP BY p3.seller_no ) review ON sales.seller_no = review.seller_no
) ss ON p.seller_no = ss.seller_no
WHERE p.cate_no = #{cateNo} AND p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'
ORDER BY p.sold_count DESC, p.product_no DESC
ORDER BY (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) ASC
ORDER BY (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) DESC
ORDER BY rv.avg_rating DESC, rv.review_count DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN rv.avg_rating IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, rv.avg_rating ASC
ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
ORDER BY p.sold_count DESC, p.product_no DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product p
JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
WHERE p.cate_no = #{cateNo} AND p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc,
p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.stock AS stock, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee,
img.image_path AS imagePath,
sp.company_name AS sellerName,
IFNULL(rv.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS reviewCount,
IFNULL(ss.seller_avg_rating, 0) AS sellerAvgRating, IFNULL(ss.seller_review_count, 0) AS sellerReviewCount, IFNULL(ss.seller_sold_count, 0) AS sellerSoldCount,
CASE WHEN ss.seller_avg_rating >= 4.5 AND ss.seller_review_count >= 10 THEN 'SATISFACTION'
WHEN ss.seller_sold_count >= 2000 THEN 'BEST'
WHEN ss.seller_avg_rating >= 4.0 OR ss.seller_sold_count >= 1600 THEN 'EXCELLENT'
ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS sellerBadgeCode
FROM product p
JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, MAX( CASE WHEN image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN image_path END ) AS image_path FROM product_image GROUP BY product_no ) img ON p.product_no = img.product_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(review_no) AS review_count FROM product_review GROUP BY product_no ) rv ON p.product_no = rv.product_no
/* 판매자 전체 통계 판매중 상품 + 운영중 판매자 기준으로만 계산한다. 판매량과 리뷰 통계를 분리해서 계산한다. 그래야 리뷰 개수만큼 sold_count가 중복 합산되지 않는다. */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sales.seller_no, sales.seller_sold_count, IFNULL(review.seller_avg_rating, 0) AS seller_avg_rating, IFNULL(review.seller_review_count, 0) AS seller_review_count
FROM ( /* 판매자별 누적 판매량 */ SELECT p2.seller_no, SUM(p2.sold_count) AS seller_sold_count FROM product p2
JOIN seller_profile sp2 ON p2.seller_no = sp2.seller_no
WHERE p2.status = '판매중' AND sp2.status = '운영중'
GROUP BY p2.seller_no ) sales
LEFT JOIN ( /* 판매자별 전체 리뷰 평균 / 리뷰 수 */ SELECT p3.seller_no, ROUND(AVG(pr.rating), 1) AS seller_avg_rating, COUNT(pr.review_no) AS seller_review_count FROM product p3
JOIN seller_profile sp3 ON p3.seller_no = sp3.seller_no
JOIN product_review pr ON p3.product_no = pr.product_no
WHERE p3.status = '판매중' AND sp3.status = '운영중'
GROUP BY p3.seller_no ) review ON sales.seller_no = review.seller_no
) ss ON p.seller_no = ss.seller_no
WHERE p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'
AND
p.basic_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.basic_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) >= #{minPrice}
AND (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) <= #{maxPrice}
ORDER BY p.sold_count DESC, p.product_no DESC
ORDER BY (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) ASC
ORDER BY (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) DESC
ORDER BY rv.avg_rating DESC, rv.review_count DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN rv.avg_rating IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, rv.avg_rating ASC
ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
ORDER BY p.sold_count DESC, p.product_no DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM product p
JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
WHERE p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'
AND
p.basic_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
( p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.basic_desc LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
p.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) >= #{minPrice}
AND (p.price - FLOOR(p.price * p.discount_rate / 100)) <= #{maxPrice}

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.seller_no AS sellerNo, p.cate_no AS cateNo,
p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc, p.brand AS brand,
p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.point AS point, p.stock AS stock, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, p.status AS status,
pn.origin AS origin,
img.image_path AS imagePath,
sp.company_name AS sellerName,
IFNULL(rv.avg_rating, 0) AS avgRating, IFNULL(rv.review_count, 0) AS reviewCount
FROM product p
JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN product_notice pn ON p.product_no = pn.product_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, MAX( CASE WHEN image_type = 'THUMB3' THEN image_path END ) AS image_path FROM product_image GROUP BY product_no ) img ON p.product_no = img.product_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(review_no) AS review_count FROM product_review GROUP BY product_no ) rv ON p.product_no = rv.product_no
WHERE p.product_no = #{productNo} AND p.status = '판매중' AND sp.status = '운영중'

SELECT option_no AS optionNo, product_no AS productNo, option_group_no AS optionGroupNo, option_name AS optionName, option_value AS optionValue, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM product_option WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY option_group_no ASC, sort_order ASC, option_no ASC

SELECT image_no AS imageNo, product_no AS productNo, image_type AS imageType, image_path AS imagePath, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM product_image WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND image_type = 'DETAIL' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, image_no ASC

SELECT notice_no AS noticeNo, product_no AS productNo, product_status AS productStatus, tax_type AS taxType, receipt_type AS receiptType, business_type AS businessType, origin AS origin FROM product_notice WHERE product_no = #{productNo}

SELECT pr.review_no AS reviewNo, pr.order_item_no AS orderItemNo, pr.member_no AS memberNo, pr.product_no AS productNo, pr.rating AS rating, pr.content AS content, pr.reg_date AS regDate,
m.member_id AS memberId,
ri.image_path AS imagePath
FROM product_review pr
JOIN member m ON pr.member_no = m.member_no
LEFT JOIN review_image ri ON ri.review_image_no = ( SELECT ri2.review_image_no FROM review_image ri2 WHERE ri2.review_no = pr.review_no ORDER BY ri2.sort_order ASC, ri2.review_image_no ASC LIMIT 1 )
WHERE pr.product_no = #{productNo}
ORDER BY pr.reg_date DESC, pr.review_no DESC
LIMIT #{pageRequestDTO.offset}, #{pageRequestDTO.size}

SELECT product_no AS productNo, seller_no AS sellerNo, cate_no AS cateNo, product_name AS productName, basic_desc AS basicDesc, brand AS brand, price AS price, discount_rate AS discountRate, point AS point, stock AS stock, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, status AS status, view_count AS viewCount, sold_count AS soldCount, reg_date AS regDate FROM product WHERE product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (seller_no, cate_no, product_name, basic_desc, brand, price, discount_rate, point, stock, delivery_fee, status) VALUES (#{sellerNo}, #{cateNo}, #{productName}, #{basicDesc}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{discountRate}, #{point}, #{stock}, #{deliveryFee}, '판매중')

INSERT INTO product_image (product_no, image_type, image_path, sort_order) VALUES
(#{img.productNo}, #{img.imageType}, #{img.imagePath}, #{img.sortOrder})

INSERT INTO product_option (product_no, option_group_no, option_name, option_value, sort_order) VALUES
(#{opt.productNo}, #{opt.optionGroupNo}, #{opt.optionName}, #{opt.optionValue}, #{opt.sortOrder})
INSERT INTO product_notice (product_no, product_status, tax_type, receipt_type, business_type, origin) VALUES (#{productNo}, #{productStatus}, #{taxType}, #{receiptType}, #{businessType}, #{origin})
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET status = #{status} WHERE product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM product_image WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND image_type = #{imageType}
mapper.update: UPDATE product_notice SET product_status = #{productStatus}, tax_type = #{taxType}, receipt_type = #{receiptType}, business_type = #{businessType}, origin = #{origin} WHERE product_no = #{productNo}
mapper.select: SELECT image_no AS imageNo, product_no AS productNo, image_type AS imageType, image_path AS imagePath, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM product_image WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY image_type, sort_order

if.test: searchType != null and keyword != null and keyword != ''

choose.when: AND CAST(p.product_no AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.product_name AS productName, c.cate_name AS cateName, sp.company_name AS sellerName, p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.point AS point, p.stock AS stock, p.status AS status, p.reg_date AS regDate, img.image_path AS thumbPath FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.cate_no = c.cate_no LEFT JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, image_path FROM product_image WHERE image_type = 'THUMB1' ) img ON p.product_no = img.product_no
ORDER BY p.product_no DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product p LEFT JOIN category c ON p.cate_no = c.cate_no LEFT JOIN seller_profile sp ON p.seller_no = sp.seller_no
